[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1011001 4
1 0000111 3
2 1101011 5
3 1110110 5
4 0111111 6
5 1111100 5
6 1110101 5
7 1101101 5

70 07 0001011 3
